parents.subject: LU-19346 mdc: add missing cur_grant_bytes param

commit.subject: LU-17037 tests: full group testing with sparse OST indexes
commit.message:
LU-17037 tests: full group testing with sparse OST indexes

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=runtests

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,ONLY="103" \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,SANITY_EXCEPT="103" \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,ONLY="200a" \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=sanity-flr

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,SANITY_FLR_EXCEPT="200a" \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=sanity-flr

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
testlist=sanity-quota

Change-Id: I0398623860a3163a171c2967b5abf1acaf171b4f
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
